component.name: VR Hotspot
component.summary: Desktop and tray controls for a host-installed VRhotspot daemon

description.p: VR Hotspot is a desktop companion for the separately installed VRhotspot daemon. It provides a persistent system-tray status icon, basic hotspot controls, and optional secure API-token storage.
The privileged daemon and its host installer remain separate from this unprivileged application.
Added the functional system-tray control surface and wallet support.
